info.name: QueueCare API Tests
info.description: Full API test suite — 33 requests, 70+ assertions. Auth: JWT extracted from response body and sent as Cookie header. Dates computed dynamically in pre-request scripts. Run: newman run QueueCare.postman_collection.json --environment QueueCare.postman_environment.json

exec: // 201 = created, 409 = already exists — both are acceptable
pm.sendRequest({ url: 'http://localhost:5000/api/appointments', method: 'GET', header: { Cookie: 'token=' + pm.environment.get('patientToken') } }, function(err, res) {
if (!err) { var p = res.json().appointments.find(function(a){ return a.status === 'pending'; }); if (p) pm.environment.set('serveAppointmentId', p._id); }
pm.test('Generic error — does not hint which field failed', () => {
